variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16622 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16622 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16622 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P951535 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16622
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P951535 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal features a secure radialseal fit that ensures high-efficiency air filtration while preventing unfiltered air from entering the engine. It captures harmful airborne contaminants, optimizing airflow and enhancing engine performance and longevity. Designed for use in rugged environments, this filter offers excellent durability and a long service life. Its radialseal technology makes installation simple while ensuring a tight, reliable seal that protects your engine under the harshest conditions.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF27826 Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16622
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF27826 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
